description: Style NoteDon that sporty look with Swoosh cap from nike. Made of blended fabric, this cap ensures your head is absolutely sweat-free all day long. Product DetailsBlack cap with eyelets on the crownAdjustable velcro back strapNike swoosh logo embroidered on the left side of the crownKNVB brand embroidered on the crown Material and CareBlended fabricMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry on lowCool ironDo not iron on design or dry clean
